name: 10 Minute Szechuan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1 1/2 inch cubes. Lightly toss with cornstarch in a bag to coat.
2. Heat oil in a skillet or wok; stir-fry chicken and garlic until lightly browned.
3. Add soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and water. Cover and cook for 3 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
4. Add green onions and cayenne. Cook uncovered about 2 more minutes.
221 calories per serving.
